caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio against a grey, horizontally ribbed acoustic foam wall. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional silver microphone, mounted on a black boom arm, is positioned directly in front of him. On the boom arm, the text "RØDE" is visible. The man is speaking and gesturing with his left arm. He begins by raising his fist near his head, then transitions into a pointing gesture with his index finger, and finally moves his hand in a blurred motion away from his head. Throughout the sequence, his facial expression shifts as he talks, with his mouth opening and closing. A tattoo is partially visible on his right upper arm.
